CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Defendant John Beatties Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Documents To Defendants Request For Production
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Philip Behrens of Foster Employment Law telephone number 510-763-1900 for Defendant John Beattie.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Defendant stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN BEATTIE'S Motion To Compel Responses And Documents To Defendants Request For Production is granted. No opposition filed. The response and related documents shall be produced within twenty days after service of this Order with Notice of Entry. Sanctions in the sum of $750.00 are awarded to the moving party as against plaintiff's counsel only. Sanctions to be paid within twenty days of service of this Order. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
